title: XP: DevTools
description: Adds useful tools that make life easier for modpack and mod creators
body:
This is a mod that includes tools used by the XP team. I've added the one I use most often for now, but I'll be adding the other tools used by the team soon. # **Tools** **Quick Game Mode Switch Buttons** * These allow you to switch between game modes more quickly. They are located at the top of the inventory or on the pause screen. **Special Hammer** (will be in version 1.0.1) * Clicking + Shift with this tool opens a window where you can choose a loot table, either from vanilla Minecraft or any installed mod. * Once selected, right-clicking with the hammer will spawn a chest containing that loot table. The chest always faces the player. **Entity ID Scissors** * Right-click any entity to copy its ID to your clipboard (e.g., minecraft:zombie, minecraft:creeper). * Shift + Right-click to copy the entity's complete NBT data all the internal information about that specific mob (health, equipment, custom name, potion effects, etc.). Perfect for debugging, creating datapacks, or inspecting entity properties without commands. #  

🌐 Join Our Discord Community

Do you have new ideas, improvements for my mods, or have you found a bug? This is the perfect place to share them!

In our Discord community you can:

💡 Submit proposals and suggestions for improving the mods.

🛠️ Report problems and bugs so we can fix them together.

🎮 Show your creativity: you're free to use my mods in your own modpacks.

📢 Share your modpack on the server and show the community your unique style.

This space is designed for us to grow together, with respect and enthusiasm for creating mods and modpacks. Your contribution is always welcome!
